replies.msg:
22 January 2019

Dear Full Member of the Union,

Re: Polling Days for Annual Election 2019 and the Election of Undergraduate Student Membership to the Boards of Faculties 2019

(Notice Reference No: AE2019010/FB2019010)

The Polling Days for Annual Election 2019 and the Election of Undergraduate Student
Membership to the Boards of Faculties 2019 are coming soon. This serves as the notice of
Polling Days of Annual Election 2019 and the Election of Undergraduate Student
Membership to the Boards of Faculties 2019.

For Annual Election 2019, all Full Members of the Union are eligible voters, including:
1) All full-time undergraduates registered to read for any bachelor’s degree offered by the
University;
2) All part-time undergraduates registered to read for any bachelors’ degree offered by the
University and paid the prescribed fee;
3) All postgraduates registered to read for master’s degree or doctorate offered by the
University or as a student for a certificate or diploma of the University and paid the
prescribed fee.

For the Election of Undergraduate Student Membership to the Boards of Faculties 2019, all
full-time undergraduates registered to read for any bachelor’s degree offered by the
University are eligible voters.

The details of the Polling Days are as follows:

a. Date: 28 January 2019 – 1 February 2019

b. Polling Stations and opening hours:
Main Campus (10:15 – 18:45)
1. Union Foyer
2. Area outside OBC Grill
3. Area near JUPAS Office (UG/F Knowles Building)
4. Run Run Shaw Podium (Opposite to old University Bookstore)
5. Area outside Bank of East Asia

Dental Campus (12:00 – 14:00)
6. Area outside Canteen on 7/F, Prince Philip Dental Hospital

Medical Campus (10:15 – 18:00)
7. Lobby of William M.W. Mong Block

c. Vote Counting
Date: 1 February 2019
Time: 20:00
Venue: Union Foyer

Should you have any enquiries, please contact the undersigned via
owenleung.asterism@gmail.com or at 6113 3173. Thank you for your kind attention.

Best regards,
LEUNG Ho Long
Chairperson
Union Elections Committee
HKUSU Council
Session 2018
Tel: (+852) 6113 3173
Email: owenleung.asterism@gmail.com
